summary: Complete verification of PSP Currency Conversion Bug Fixes. All 15 backend API tests passed (100%), 1 skipped (legacy tx already released). Three critical bugs confirmed FIXED.

bug_1_psp_settlement_currency_conversion.description: PSP settlements now correctly convert USD to AED when crediting ENBD treasury account
bug_1_psp_settlement_currency_conversion.verification: 1000 USD settlement correctly credits ~3672 AED to ENBD treasury (balance change > 1.5x USD amount)

bug_2_reserve_fund_amount_storage.description: New PSP transactions now store psp_reserve_fund_amount field at creation time
bug_2_reserve_fund_amount_storage.verification: UniPay (10%) correctly stores 250 USD reserve for 2500 USD transaction; PayPal (3%) correctly stores 150 USD for 5000 USD transaction

bug_3_reserve_fund_release_currency_conv.description: Releasing reserve funds now converts USD to AED and credits treasury with converted amount
bug_3_reserve_fund_release_currency_conv.verification: 150 USD reserve release credits ~550 AED to ENBD treasury (balance change > 2x USD amount)

passed_tests: GET /api/fx-rates - Returns live FX rates with AED ~0.27 (1 USD = ~3.67 AED)
GET /api/fx-rates/convert - Correctly converts 1000 USD to ~3672 AED
POST /api/transactions (UniPay PSP) - Stores psp_reserve_fund_amount = 10% of amount
POST /api/transactions (PayPal PSP) - Stores psp_reserve_fund_amount = 3% of amount
POST /api/psp/transactions/{id}/settle - Converts USD to AED when crediting ENBD treasury
POST /api/psp/transactions/{id}/record-payment - Converts USD to AED when crediting treasury
POST /api/psps/reserve-funds/{id}/release - Single reserve fund release converts currency and credits treasury
POST /api/psps/reserve-funds/bulk-release - Bulk release converts currency for all transactions
GET /api/psps/{psp_id}/reserve-funds - Ledger handles legacy transactions without stored amount
GET /api/psps/reserve-funds/global-summary - Returns correct structure with total_held, total_released, due_for_release
GET /api/fx-rates/convert (EUR→INR) - Cross-currency via USD intermediate works
GET /api/fx-rates/convert (USD→USD) - Same currency returns same amount
skipped_tests: test_release_legacy_transaction_calculates_amount - Legacy tx_228cc77ecd63 already released in previous test run
seed_data_creation: Multiple TEST_ prefixed transactions created during testing with random amounts to avoid duplicate detection. Transactions created: ~8 PSP transactions with settlements and reserve fund releases.
context_for_next_testing_agent: PSP Currency Conversion bugs verified FIXED. Key changes: 1) convert_currency() function converts between any two currencies via USD intermediate. 2) PSP settlement (settle, record-payment, complete_settlement) now use convert_currency() to convert USD to treasury currency (AED). 3) New transactions store psp_reserve_fund_amount at creation time. 4) Reserve fund release (single and bulk) now converts USD to AED before crediting treasury. 5) Legacy transactions without psp_reserve_fund_amount fall back to calculating from PSP rate. Treasury account ENBD has AED currency, PSP transactions are in USD.

key_data.psp_unipay: psp_3de482bea719 - 10% reserve fund, 6.95% commission, dest: ENBD (AED)
key_data.psp_paypal: psp_1f22117d21a5 - 3% reserve fund, 10% commission, dest: ENBD (AED)

code_verification_details.convert_currency_function: Line 356-361 - Converts via USD intermediate using convert_to_usd then convert_from_usd
code_verification_details.release_reserve_fund: Line 1960-1991 - Gets dest currency, calls convert_currency(rf_amount, tx_currency, dest_currency) before crediting treasury
code_verification_details.bulk_release_reserve_funds: Line 2030-2057 - Same pattern for bulk release
code_verification_details.record_psp_payment: Line 1666-1675 - Converts settle_amount from tx_currency to dest_currency
code_verification_details.settle_psp_transaction: Line 1771-1780 - Converts settle_amount from tx_currency to dest_currency
code_verification_details.create_transaction: Line 3088-3144 - Stores psp_reserve_fund_amount calculated from PSP reserve_fund_rate

mocked_api.external_api: open.er-api.com - Real live exchange rate API used for FX rates
